text: What if I told you carbon is a shape-shifter? Carbon moves between the air, oceans, rocks, and life, creating a delicate balance. But what happens when we overload one of these reservoirs with CO2? Human fossil fuel emissions are pushing carbon into the atmosphere faster than it can cycle back. This overload disrupts ecosystems, weather patterns, and our future. Stay curious and learn how you can help balance the carbon cycle. Follow for more!
